title: Richly Spiced Malaysian Chicken Pie
description: A velvety and adventurous Malaysian dish featuring brandy and Mediterranean-friendly flavors, all wrapped in a flaky en-croute pastry.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and cook the onion until softened.
Add the garlic and ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned.
Add the brandy, cumin, and coriander to the skillet and stir to combine.
Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a large rectangle.
Spoon the chicken mixture onto one half of the pastry, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Brush the edges of the pastry with water and fold the other half over the filling.
Press the edges to seal and cut a few slits in the top of the pie.
Place the pie on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes.
Reduce the oven temperature to 375 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes.
